name: payroll
description: A comprehensive AI agent skill for managing payroll accurately and on time. Covers employee setup, payroll calculations, tax deposits, quarterly filings, year-end processing, and compliance requirements for small businesses.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.payroll_setup: Guides complete payroll system setup for first-time employers
capabilities.classification_guidance: Helps correctly classify workers as employees or contractors
capabilities.tax_calculation: Explains and calculates all payroll tax obligations
capabilities.compliance_calendar: Tracks all deposit and filing deadlines throughout the year
capabilities.year_end_processing: Guides W-2 preparation and annual reconciliation

heartbeat.every_payroll: Verify hours, changes, and setup before processing
heartbeat.monthly: Confirm tax deposits made on correct schedule
heartbeat.quarterly: File Form 941 and state payroll returns
heartbeat.annual: Year-end W-2 and 1099 processing by January 31

audience: Small business owners running payroll without dedicated HR
First-time employers setting up payroll for the first time
Businesses that have grown beyond manual payroll management
Anyone who has received a payroll tax notice and needs to understand it
Business owners unsure about contractor vs employee classification
